# Star Trek Adventures — Test Fixture

## Overview

This directory contains the synthetic test fixture for the Star Trek Adventures (STA)
character importer in TavernTAIls.

## Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `japelsta.pdf` | Synthetic fillable-PDF fixture representing **Ja'pel**, a Vulcan science officer |

## Character: Ja'pel

Ja'pel is a **synthetic** test character — no copyright on any real character sheet is
reproduced here.  The PDF is generated programmatically by
`server/tests/fixtures/sta/generate_japel.py` using only the official STA field names
(which are functional UI labels, not copyrightable expression).

### Key Fields

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Character Name | Ja'pel |
| Species | Vulcan |
| Rank | Lieutenant |
| Assignment | USS Enterprise |
| Department | Science |

### Attributes (1–12 scale)

| Attribute | Score |
|-----------|-------|
| Control | 10 |
| Daring | 7 |
| Fitness | 9 |
| Insight | 11 |
| Presence | 8 |
| Reason | 12 |

| Command | 2 |
| Conn | 2 |
| Engineering | 3 |
| Medicine | 2 |
| Science | 5 |
| Security | 2 |

- Tricorder

## Schema Mapping Notes

Star Trek Adventures uses a **2d20 system** that differs significantly from D&D 5e:

| STA Concept | TavernTAIls Schema Key | Notes |
|-------------|------------------------|-------|
| Attributes (6) | `sheet.attributes` | Control/Daring/Fitness/Insight/Presence/Reason |
| Disciplines (6) | `sheet.disciplines` | Command/Conn/Engineering/Medicine/Science/Security |
| Stress (current) | `sheet.stress.current` | Replaces D&D HP |
| Stress (max) | `sheet.stress.max` | Replaces D&D HP max |
| Determination | `sheet.stress.determination` | No D&D equivalent |
| Values | `sheet.values` | List of character motivations |
| Focuses | `sheet.focuses` | Specialist skill areas |
| Talents | `sheet.talents` | Special abilities |
| Traits | `sheet.traits` | Narrative descriptors |
| Injuries | `sheet.injuries` | Persistent wound conditions |
| Species | `sheet.species` | Replaces D&D Race |
| Rank | `sheet.rank` | No D&D equivalent |
| Assignment | `sheet.assignment` | No D&D equivalent |
| Department | top-level `class_name` | Closest analogue to D&D class |

Fields stored under `sheet` use system-namespaced semantics where needed to avoid
overloading D&D-centric keys (e.g. `stress` is **not** `hp`).

## Regenerating the PDF

The `japelsta.pdf` here is generated by `server/tests/fixtures/sta/generate_japel.py`
(a pre-existing fixture generator) and then copied to this directory:

```bash
python server/tests/fixtures/sta/generate_japel.py
cp server/tests/fixtures/sta/japelsta.pdf \
   server/tests/fixtures/star_trek_adventures/japelsta.pdf
```

Alternatively, the same PDF can be built in-memory by the seed script helper:

```python
from server.scripts.seed_star_trek_adventures_characters import build_japel_pdf
pdf_bytes = build_japel_pdf()
```

## Licensing

The fixture PDF is 100% synthetic — generated by TavernTAIls test infrastructure.
No Modiphius / Star Trek intellectual property is reproduced.  Field names
(Control, Daring, etc.) are functional UI labels used under fair-use and
interoperability principles.
